parents.subject: LU-18448 llite: disable dir read on open by default

commit.subject: LU-18995 osc: Remove unnecessary NULL check
commit.message:
LU-18995 osc: Remove unnecessary NULL check

Remove unnecessary NULL check after container_of() as
container_of() would never return NULL.

This is reported by smatch

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: If294ffbb8e3a2008dfe0991e741477bd7005ca5a
